hero.title: Jacob Kashalala.
hero.subtitle: I build modern web applications.
hero.description: Full-stack developer specialising in modern JavaScript ecosystems, with advanced expertise in Next.js, React, TypeScript and the design of professional, high-performance and scalable web platforms.

about.label: About
about.title: Who am I?
about.p1: I am a Full-Stack web developer passionate about building modern, fast and useful applications.
about.p2: I mainly work with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Prisma and PostgreSQL to build professional platforms.
about.p3: My goal is to create clean, high-performance digital solutions adapted to real business needs.

item1.task1: Design and development of the web platform
item1.task2: Development of user interfaces using Next.js, React and Tailwind CSS.
item1.task3: Development of professional web-based tools for service management, parcel handling and business workflows.

item2.task1: Built an online printing services platform.
item2.task2: Developed internal tools to manage orders and customers.
item2.task3: Planned integrations with e-commerce, CRM and automation systems.

item3.task1: Modern website design for businesses and organisations.
item3.task2: Development of user interfaces using Next.js, React and Tailwind CSS.
item3.task3: Implementation of digital solutions to enhance online presence.

item1.description: A modern platform for ordering printing, shipping and business solutions, designed to offer a simple, fast and reliable experience for individuals and businesses.

item2.description: A digital agency specialising in web development, design, printing and professional digital solutions for businesses and organisations.

item3.description: A modern online printing platform offering fast, simple and professional solutions for all your printing and marketing material needs.

item4.description: A modern platform dedicated to investment and trading, designed to analyse markets, track performance and manage financial assets in a simple and smart way.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let’s talk about your project
contact.description: I am available for web projects, collaborations or professional opportunities. Feel free to contact me.
